agent_actions.dry_run_note: Do not fabricate MATLAB, Simulink, or bench results.
inputs: Any request requiring unconfigured MATLAB execution
agent_actions.label: Refuse unsupported runtime claims

ci_validation: Validate JSON serialization of manifest, lab plan, adapter plan, artifacts, focus map, probe plan, and Lab Delta response.
Inspect generated MATLAB script text for hand-check formulas and named outputs.
Verify dry-run plans set requires_matlab_runtime=false at bundle level.
Verify runtime action steps are marked requires_matlab_runtime=true when they would need MATLAB later.
future_runtime_hooks: Launch MATLAB App Designer popup with command: citt.
Call hilite_system for block, line, port, and annotation targets after a model exists.
Insert signal logging or Simscape sensors from ProbePlan entries.
Run MATLAB/Simulink simulations through an optional local adapter.
Package +citt/, templates/, examples/, docs/, and app/ into a .mltbx toolbox.
refusal_rules: Do not claim that MATLAB, Simulink, Simscape, hilite_system, or .mltbx packaging ran unless a future adapter reports that execution evidence.
Do not turn LLM prose into final numerical answers.
Do not diagnose biomedical safety or patient-connected device compliance.
If a model region cannot be mapped to a focus target, return a clear missing-map message.
If measured data uses unknown units or measurement points, ask for clarification before ranking causes strongly.
required_matlab_products: Simscape Electrical for future sensor insertion templates
supported_now: Fetch and render the typed plugin manifest.
Fetch generated MATLAB script text and dry-run Simulink build plans.
Render four popup tabs from JSON without MATLAB execution.
Map focus entries to current SVG targets or future Simulink paths.
Render probe plans and Lab Delta comparison suggestions.

future_simulink_actions: Highlight the full signal path from source through RC filter to sampling stage.
Future MATLAB plugin may call hilite_system on connected blocks and lines.
focus_map.reason: The student needs the map before interpreting any local value.
focus_map.student_prompt: Where does the anti-aliasing decision happen in this chain?

target.description: Whole-model path students should understand before probing.
target.label: Input to filter to sampler to output

focus_map.title: Signal flow overview

future_simulink_actions: Highlight the source block and line into the RC subsystem.
focus_map.reason: Students should see that the unwanted 60 Hz component enters before filtering.
focus_map.student_prompt: Which frequency component do you expect the filter to reduce more?

target.description: The signal before the RC stage.
target.label: ECG-like signal plus 60 Hz interference

focus_map.title: Input path

future_simulink_actions: Highlight the RC subsystem and its parameter annotation.
focus_map.reason: This is where fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) becomes a model parameter.
focus_map.student_prompt: What happens to fc if C is accidentally entered in uF instead of nF?

target.description: The first-order low-pass stage that sets cutoff.
target.label: R-C low-pass stage

focus_map.title: RC filter

future_simulink_actions: Highlight the zero-order hold or ADC sample block.
focus_map.reason: Filtering must be interpreted relative to fs and Nyquist.
focus_map.student_prompt: How does Nyquist compare with the 60 Hz interference?

target.description: The point where Nyquist and sample time matter.
target.label: ADC sampling stage

focus_map.title: Sampling stage

future_simulink_actions: Highlight the logged output line and scope block.
focus_map.reason: This is the student-visible consequence of the filter and sampler.
focus_map.student_prompt: What visual change should the filtered output show compared with the input?

target.description: The waveform sent to downstream analysis.
target.label: Filtered and sampled output

focus_map.title: Output signal

future_simulink_actions: Attach logging or a voltage probe at the RC output port.
focus_map.reason: Lab Delta is only meaningful if all three values refer to the same point.
focus_map.student_prompt: Are your hand value, simulation value, and measured value all taken at this point?

target.description: The probe point used to compare hand, simulation, and lab values.
target.label: RC output measurement

focus_map.title: Lab Delta measurement point

assumptions: The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.
The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.
The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data.
lab.bme_safety_boundary: This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.
idealizations: No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.
Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.
ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet.
lab.objective: Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.
lab.title: RC anti-aliasing before ADC

lab_delta_seed_request.notes: Seed example intentionally shows angular frequency reported as Hz.

assumptions: The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.
The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.
The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data.
overview.bme_safety_boundary: This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.
idealizations: No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.
Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.
ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet.
overview.objective: Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.

probe_plan.expected_behavior: The 60 Hz component should be smaller after the RC stage.
future_matlab_steps: Enable signal logging on the RC output line.
Add a scope or logged signal named rc_filter_output.
Associate the log with focus_map entry lab_delta_measurement_point.
matlab_comment_lines: % CiTT Probe tab: add voltage probe at RC output.
probe_plan.measurement_explanation: This probe checks the exact point where the filter output is handed to the sampling stage.
probe_plan.student_goal: Inspect the local signal after the low-pass stage and before sampling.
probe_plan.student_question: Does the measured output match the cutoff you calculated by hand?
suggested_sensor_insertion: Voltage sensor from vout to ground in a future Simscape model.
probe_plan.title: Add voltage probe at RC output

probe_plan.expected_behavior: The post-filter 60 Hz amplitude should be lower than the input amplitude.
future_matlab_steps: Compute or estimate the 60 Hz component in both logged signals.
Show the comparison in the Probe tab before Lab Delta diagnosis.
matlab_comment_lines: % CiTT Probe tab: compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component.
probe_plan.measurement_explanation: This separates filter behavior from sampling behavior before discussing aliasing.
probe_plan.student_goal: Estimate how much interference remains at the ADC input.
probe_plan.student_question: Is 60 Hz far enough above cutoff to be meaningfully reduced?

target.label: 60 Hz before/after comparison
target.simulink_path: citt_rc_antialias_adc/Input Path to RC Filter Output

probe_plan.title: Compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component

probe_plan.expected_behavior: Samples should follow the filtered waveform at 500 Hz.
future_matlab_steps: Log the zero-order hold or ADC output line.
Compare sampled_output against filtered_output at the same timestamps.
matlab_comment_lines: % CiTT Probe tab: log sampled output for ADC comparison.
probe_plan.measurement_explanation: This probe connects the analog filter output to the ADC learning objective.
probe_plan.student_goal: Inspect what the ADC-facing data stream would contain.
probe_plan.student_question: Does the sampled waveform preserve the filtered signal without alias surprises?
probe_plan.title: Log sampled output

common_mistakes: Treating the sampler as if it can remove analog interference by itself.
Looking only at the output without checking the input path.
teach_steps.explanation: Anti-aliasing is a chain problem: the analog filter changes the waveform before the sampler sees it.
teach_steps.prompt_before_reveal: Before calculating, point to where the ECG-like signal, 60 Hz interference, filter, sampler, and output each live.
teach_steps.title: Trace the signal chain

common_mistakes: Using omega_c as if it were Hz.
teach_steps.explanation: For a first-order RC low-pass, fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) in Hz and omega_c = 1/(R*C) in rad/s.
teach_steps.prompt_before_reveal: Predict whether the cutoff should use R*C or 2*pi*R*C.
teach_steps.title: Calculate the RC cutoff

common_mistakes: Checking Nyquist but forgetting the analog filter response.
Comparing sampled output to hand cutoff at a different measurement point.
teach_steps.explanation: The RC stage should reduce the 60 Hz component before the ADC-facing samples are interpreted.
teach_steps.prompt_before_reveal: Compare 60 Hz, the cutoff, and Nyquist before looking at the sampled plot.
teach_steps.title: Connect cutoff to sampling
